prompt:
A compact dark-sky kit bundled on a bench: a small red flashlight, folded layered clothing, and a charged phone-like device tucked into a pouch with a zipper. A pair of gloves and a simple checklist card are visible, with no readable text, clearly conveying “packed and ready for aurora watching.”

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future outdoor-prep aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean materials, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the red flashlight and packed bundle centered so it reads well as an icon.
